structuralHints.treeSitterQuery:
(call_expression
  function: (selector_expression
    operand: (parenthesized_expression
      (type_assertion_expression
        type: (pointer_type
          (qualified_type
            package: (package_identifier) @pkg
            name: (type_identifier) @type))))
    field: (field_identifier) @method)
  arguments: (argument_list
    .
    (_)
    .
    (int_literal) @offender
    .)
  (#eq? @pkg "regexp")
  (#eq? @type "Regexp")
  (#match? @method "^FindAll")
  (#eq? @offender "0"))

structuralHints.treeSitterQuery:
(type_declaration
  (type_spec
    name: (type_identifier)
    type: (struct_type
      (field_declaration_list
        (field_declaration
          name: (field_identifier)
          type: (_)) @first_field
        (field_declaration
          name: (field_identifier)
          type: [
            (qualified_type
              package: (package_identifier) @pkg
              name: (type_identifier) @type)
            (type_identifier) @type
          ]) @offender
        (#match? @type "^(Uint64|Int64)$")
        (#eq? @pkg "atomic")
        (#not-match? @first_field "(uint64|int64|atomic\\.(Uint64|Int64)|float64|complex64)")))))

  name: (identifier) @name

          name: (type_identifier) @type))))

  (#eq? @type "M")
  (#not-match? @body "os\\.Exit"))
